description: Inputs passed to the Guardrail policy WASM at evaluation time. At least one of `protocolId` or `vaultAddress` is required.

protocolId.description: Guardrail protocol identifier. Used as the alert/health target when no vault address is supplied.

vaultAddress.description: Vault contract address (0x-prefixed). Preferred target when both fields are present.

chainId.description: EVM chain id of the target (e.g. 1 for mainnet). Optional; passed through to the Guardrail API as a filter.
